nl_query: List all board coordinators with a honorarium weight different from 1.0.
failed_sql: SELECT bc.id, bc.board_id, bc.employee_id, bc.honorarium_weight, bc.effective_from, bc.effective_to, fc.name AS coordinator_name FROM board_coordinator bc JOIN faculty_cache fc ON fc.employee_erp_id = bc.employee_id WHERE bc.honorarium_weight <> 1.0 ORDER BY bc.effective_from DESC;
